data.location: 11924 Forest Hill Blvd, Suite 26, Wellington, FL 33414
data.status: May 18th or May 25th, per a recent post on Instagram
data.short_description: Entre Campos is a boutique-style Argentine-inspired coffee shop opening in Wellington, FL, owned by Jacqueline Porcano with her son Agustin Puga as partner and manager. The shop will offer 28 indoor seats, planned outdoor seating, and traditional Argentine mate alongside Italian and Colombian coffee, empanadas, alfajores, salads, and gelato. Hours are planned Monday through Saturday 7:30 a.m.–6 p.m. and Sunday 9 a.m.–4 p.m.

data.status: aiming for an end-of-May reopening, pending final local and state permits
data.short_description: Casa Vialetto is a revival of Café Vialetto, the Italian fine dining restaurant owner Marcelo Chopa originally opened in 1999, reopening in a smaller space with about 45 to 50 seats. The menu will emphasize seafood, pastas, local products, and risotto. The reopening is pending final local and state permits as of an April 17 interview.

data.event_date: Late May or early June (year not specified)
data.status: targeting a reopening in late May or early June
data.short_description: Sunset Restaurant, the oldest restaurant in Franklin originally opened in 1945, is being revived by new owners Jesse and Paige Green with a planned reopening in late May or early June. The Greens completed a full renovation, expanding the dining room to about 130 seats, while maintaining the restaurant's Southern comfort food focus. The restaurant will operate six days a week, closed on Tuesdays.

data.location: 330 Ponce De Leon Blvd, Brooksville, FL 34601
data.status: targeting an August 1 opening
data.short_description: Brooksville Bagels is a New York-inspired, preservative-free bagel shop targeting an August 1 opening at 330 Ponce De Leon Blvd, co-owned by Anastasia and Michael Alaimo. The concept has been in development for over two years and will feature bagels shipped directly from New York, a walk-up ordering system, and about 28 seats. Specialty items include "The Lox" bagel and a Cold Stone-style customizable build format.

data.event_date: Soft opening May 14–16; formal opening Memorial Day (year not specified)
data.status: planning soft opening dates May 14-16, followed by a formal opening on Memorial Day
data.short_description: Southern Touch Cafe is opening at 3313 Harbour Point Parkway in Gainesville's private Harbour Point community, owned by chef Jarrett Session. The cafe will seat about 20 inside with outdoor seating expanding total capacity to 55–60, serving Southern eclectic food for lunch, Friday night dinners, and community events. Public ordering through DoorDash and Uber Eats is targeted for the first week of June.

data.location: 5157 Jimmy Lee Smith Pkwy, Suite 101, Hiram, GA 30141
data.status: currently under construction; anticipates opening toward the end of May
data.short_description: Shawarma Queen is transitioning from a food truck into a brick-and-mortar at 5157 Jimmy Lee Smith Pkwy, Suite 101 in Hiram, GA, owned by Mohamed Abdelmegeed. The restaurant will serve halal dishes including shawarma, falafel, kebab, and stuffed Egyptian pie, seven days a week for lunch and dinner. The space is currently under construction.

data.location: 1410 Lake Hearn Dr NE, Atlanta, GA 30319
data.status: targeting a July or August opening; currently under construction
data.short_description: Dish's Bagels is a grab-and-go New York-style bagel shop planned for 1410 Lake Hearn Dr NE in Brookhaven, Atlanta, owned by Chad Dishner, targeting a July or August opening. The space will seat about 30 inside and six tables outside, offering bagels, bacon egg and cheese sandwiches, lox, and deli sandwiches with corned beef or pastrami on rye. Construction is underway with inspections, flooring, painting, and equipment installation still ahead.

data.status: currently getting permits and preparing to start remodeling; estimates opening in 2-3 months
data.short_description: A new American Deli franchise location is planned for 5250 Windward Pkwy, Suite 111 in Alpharetta, with franchisee Steven Kim estimating an opening in 2–3 months. The team is currently obtaining permits and preparing to begin remodeling. American Deli is a quick-service comfort food chain with over 200 locations known for wings, hibachi, and burgers.

data.status: opened April 11
data.short_description: Pizzeria Fiamma opened April 11 inside Crooked Can Brewery at 2265 Wisteria Drive SW in Snellville, GA, co-owned by Gregg Fiametta. The counter-service concept focuses on pizza made with imported Italian ingredients including Caputo flour, imported meats, tomatoes, and oregano. Guests order from Pizzeria Fiamma and sit in Crooked Can's shared seating area of more than 300 seats.

data.event_date: Approximately two weeks from publication (year not specified)
data.status: expected to open in about two weeks
data.short_description: MackinMikes Mac & Cheeze Bar is opening inside Crooked Can Brewery at 2265 Wisteria Drive SW in Snellville, GA, co-owned by Michael Tarrant, approximately two weeks after Pizzeria Fiamma's April 11 opening. The counter-service concept centers on a five-cheese blend of sharp cheddar, Gruyere, Gouda, mozzarella, and Parmesan, with specialty options like braised short rib mac and pulled pork mac. Guests order and sit in Crooked Can's shared seating area.

data.status: targeting a June 13 opening; currently in the decorating phase
data.short_description: Blush Room is a new upscale nightlife venue targeting a June 13 opening at 5044 Yadkin Rd in Fayetteville, NC, owned by Rodreaka Sales and Versace Granberry. The venue will feature hookah, cocktails, section packages, and a full weekly schedule of themed events. The team is currently completing final interior preparations.

data.location: 911 Duluth Highway, Suite E1, Lawrenceville, GA 30043
data.status: targeting an end-of-summer opening; currently in permitting and buildout
data.short_description: Burger Factory is a fast-casual Canada-based burger concept making its Georgia debut at 911 Duluth Highway, Suite E1 in Lawrenceville, brought by franchisee Siraje Yosef. The just-under-2,000-square-foot space will offer dine-in and takeout with menu items including signature burgers like the Juicy Lucy, poutine, funnel cake, and Tornado Fries. The location is currently in permitting and buildout.

data.status: early development; aiming for a late summer opening
data.short_description: The Bep Teahouse is a Vietnamese boba tea shop with a full kitchen coming to 6110 Oakbrook Pkwy, Suite 102 in Norcross, brought by franchisee Hugh Do as his third location. The space is designed to serve as a community hub and will be the largest location yet for the brand. Menu highlights include boba teas, soursop drinks, popcorn chicken, and bánh mì sandwiches.

data.status: opening in the coming weeks, pending final permits and approvals
data.short_description: Taqueria & Mariscos Diaz is a casual Mexican eatery opening inside a BP convenience store at 4845 Jimmy Carter Blvd in Norcross, owned by Fany Bonilla Flores. The concept is focused on quick and accessible meals for nearby workers and shoppers, with tacos, seafood dishes, and traditional Mexican fare. Opening is pending final permits and approvals.

data.status: Not specified
data.short_description: Queen P's Soulfood Kitchen is one of four coming-soon restaurants listed in the Gwinnett County roundup, located at 706 Collins Hill Rd in Lawrenceville, GA. No further details on opening date or status are provided in the article (text is truncated).

data.location: 30 Concord Commons Pl SW, Concord, NC 28027
data.event_date: Second week of June (year not specified)
data.status: targeting the second week of June; currently in the renovation phase
data.short_description: 360 Wine and Spirits is a new wine bar owned by retired Air Force veteran Timothy Degree, targeting a second-week-of-June opening at 30 Concord Commons Pl SW in Concord, NC. The roughly 1,200-square-foot space will accommodate 60–70 guests with wine, spirits, and light appetizers. The business is currently in the renovation phase.

data.status: targeting a mid-June debut
data.short_description: The Pirate Candy Shop is planning a mid-June opening at 1614 Central Ave in St. Petersburg, FL, owned by Adam Lillhannus and his wife Sol, expanding on their existing Hyde Park Village location in Tampa. The concept centers on imported Swedish candy with a large pick-and-mix selection alongside viral and international products including Dubai chocolate and Squashies from the UK. The business is family-run with sourcing support from the owner's parents in Sweden.

data.location: 3374 North University Drive, Coral Springs, FL 33065
data.event_date: September (year not specified); possibly August if construction stays on track
data.status: targeting a September opening, with a possibility of opening in August if construction stays on track
data.short_description: Big Whiskey's American Restaurant & Bar is being brought to Coral Springs by Steve Swanson alongside his sister and wife, targeting a September opening. The full-service family-friendly restaurant will feature about 180 indoor seats, 50–60 patio seats, 37 TVs, and a bar program with roughly 50–100 whiskeys. This is the group's second Big Whiskey's location, following its existing restaurant in Davie.

data.location: 913 North Beale Parkway, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32547
data.status: opened on May 4
data.short_description: The GAB Spot (Gelato, Arcade, and Bowling) opened on May 4 at 913 North Beale Parkway in Fort Walton Beach, owned by Jason Nieves and Melissa Caban. The nearly 19,470-square-foot family entertainment venue features eight bowling lanes, six duckpin lanes, five axe throwing lanes, about 40 arcade games, and a full-service restaurant and bar seating more than 200 guests.

data.location: 9 South Main Avenue, Lake Placid, FL 33852
data.status: targeting a May 8 opening
data.short_description: Cuban Sabor Cafe is a grab-and-go Cuban bakery concept owned by Jazmin Ley and Adoni Chao, targeting a May 8 opening at 9 South Main Avenue in Lake Placid, FL. The menu features scratch-made pastelitos, Cuban sandwiches, croquettes, Cuban coffee, Cuban toast, and sugarcane juice. The space will start with six seats and a bench, with flexibility to expand.

data.status: targeting a mid-May debut pending final inspections and licensing approvals
data.short_description: Three J's Ice Cream is preparing to open a brick-and-mortar location at 1600 Dundee Rd in Winter Haven, targeting a mid-May debut pending final inspections and licensing approvals. The concept specializes in rolled ice cream made on a cold plate, expanding from an existing food trailer that services multiple Central Florida counties. The shop will feature a visible cold plate station and more than 20 flavor options.

data.status: targeting an opening around August 15th, though timing is still being finalized
data.short_description: La Pinata is targeting an opening around August 15 at 850 S Tennessee Ave in Lakeland, led by Chef Jonathan Cisneros and Chef Alfredo Ortiz alongside partners including Vincent Nacimos. The full-service restaurant will blend indoor seating for about 28 with an outdoor area accommodating around 60, plus a planned outdoor mercado-style space. The menu focuses on traditional Mexican cuisine made entirely in-house, with birria tacos and pollo albóndigas as featured items.

data.event_date: Soft opening end of month; grand opening July–August (year not specified)
data.status: targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month; grand opening later in July into August, though the timeline is not final
data.short_description: Three Rabbits Brewing is finishing work on its taproom and brewery at 214 Commerce Pl in Greensboro, NC, owned by Christopher Myers, targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month. The 3,400-square-foot space includes about 1,300 square feet of taproom with a European pub feel and a 120-gallon, 3.5-barrel brewing system. The brewery will focus on European and German-style lagers long-term, starting with ales including IPAs and sours.

data.location: 1882 Goose Creek Road SW, Unit 1, Ocean Isle Beach, NC 28469
data.status: targeting an opening in the next couple of weeks
data.short_description: Waterway Tavern is a neighborhood tavern targeting an opening in the next couple of weeks on the second floor of the Brick Landing clubhouse in Ocean Isle Beach, owned by Brittany Bowers. The tavern will operate independently alongside The Links at Brick Landing and Paradise Bar and Grill, offering cocktails, beer, wine, and small bar snacks. Planned hours are Wednesday–Saturday 3 p.m.–10 p.m. and Sunday 1 p.m.–8 p.m.

data.location: 12741 Yellow Bluff Rd, Suites 1 and 2, Jacksonville, FL 32226
data.status: targeting an early to mid-August opening
data.short_description: Southern Smokehouse is being opened by Louis Joseph and Baylee Joseph of South Atlantic Hospitality at 12741 Yellow Bluff Rd, Suites 1 and 2 in Jacksonville, FL, targeting an early to mid-August opening. No further concept or menu details are provided in the article.

data.location: 23 E Main St, Avon Park, FL 33825
data.status: planning to open Friday, May 15th with a grand opening planned around 5 p.m. or 5:30 p.m.
data.short_description: Liam's Avon Park Soda Shop is planning to open on Friday, May 15 at 23 E Main St in Avon Park, FL, with a grand opening planned around 5 p.m. or 5:30 p.m. No further concept or ownership details are provided in the article (text is truncated).

data.location: 23 E Main St, Avon Park, FL 33825
data.status: planning to open Friday, May 15th, with a grand opening planned around 5 p.m. or 5:30 p.m.
data.short_description: Liam’s Avon Park Soda Shop is the second location for the soda shop concept owned by Ed “Eduardo” Giraud and Yuneisy Del Cueto. The grab-and-go shop with seating for 20-25 will offer about 250 soda flavors, fresh beef hot dogs, pretzels, cookies, ice cream and shakes. It is named after their son Liam.

data.location: 675 W Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
data.status: Hoping to debut in mid-May 2026, as of an interview on April 27th.
data.short_description: Pour Intentions is a globally inspired wine bar near the Fox Theatre with lounge-style seating and occasional DJs. It will offer charcuterie boards, small shareable plates, desserts, and a rotating wine-by-the-glass menu from small producers.

data.status: Targeting a late May opening, as of an interview on April 23rd.
data.short_description: V’s Coffee Collab is the first brick-and-mortar for the roasting and catering business. The 473-square-foot shop will offer coffee, pastries, baked goods, and retail bags with rotating artwork.

data.status: Targeting a May 22
data.short_description: Odoms and Sons BBQ is planning to open at the listed address.

data.location: 863 Ponce De Leon Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30306
data.event_date: in about a month to a month and a half
data.status: targeting an opening in about a month to a month and a half
data.short_description: Pollo Primo is planning its second location as a fast-casual pollo asado restaurant with focus on takeout, delivery, and family-friendly atmosphere. It will replicate the original concept (opened December 2021) and may add items like chili queso and quesadillas. The restaurant will also serve margaritas and beer.

data.location: 1882 Goose Creek Road SW Unit 1, Ocean Isle Beach, NC 28469
data.status: targeting an opening in the next couple of weeks
data.short_description: Waterway Tavern is preparing to open in the clubhouse.

data.status: targeting a May 1 opening
data.short_description: Toast is a new full-service restaurant and bar. The team is currently in hiring and onboarding.

data.status: targeting a soft opening next week, pending final fire and health inspections
data.short_description: Peak Pizza Bar is a fast-casual, counter-service restaurant focused on New York-style pizza.

data.status: targeting a June opening
data.short_description: Good Times Lounge is a new cocktail-focused concept that will bring an upscale nightlife experience to Uptown.

data.status: targeting a late summer to early fall opening
data.short_description: Miró Spanish Grille is planning a second location that will build on the brand’s nearly three-decade presence with updated design and expanded experience.

data.status: targeting a reopening the week of May 5
data.short_description: Cuya Cafe & Cocina has been closed for renovations and is adding a full patio remodel with retractable pergola roof plus a morning cafe concept. The updated space will nearly double seating capacity and introduce daytime counter-service breakfast alongside continuing dinner service.

data.status: targeting an August or September opening
data.short_description: Vinny’s Cafe is planning a second location in Abacoa Plaza. The fast-casual salad and wrap concept (original open since 2001) will offer about 54 indoor/outdoor seats and mirror the Boca Raton menu with emphasis on larger chopped wraps.

data.location: 3374 North University Drive, Coral Springs, FL 33065
data.status: Targeting a September opening, with a possible earlier debut in August if construction stays on schedule.
data.short_description: Big Whiskey’s is a full-service, sports-focused restaurant with large dining room, patio, and dozens of TVs. Menu includes burgers, wings, steaks, seafood, pastas, and a wide whiskey selection.

data.status: Targeting a June 10 opening, pending final permits.
data.short_description: Jerry’s Jerk is a fast-casual Caribbean restaurant expanding from a passion project. Menu features jerk chicken, jerk pork, curry goat, oxtail, and more; a food truck is also planned.

data.location: 6562 N. State Road 7, Coconut Creek, FL 33073
data.status: Targeting a June 1 opening, with potential to open sooner.
data.short_description: Abbott’s Frozen Custard is a counter-service dessert shop focused on fresh-made frozen custard with quick service and small dine-in area.

data.location: 501 S. Olive Ave., West Palm Beach, FL 33401
data.status: preparing to open at the end of May
data.short_description: Garden Butcher is the second location of the prepared food market and cafe. The ~2,300 sq ft space in a former bus station will offer 70 seats, grab-and-go meals, made-to-order options, and items free of seed oils and refined sugars.

data.location: 12741 Yellow Bluff Rd., Suites 1 and 2, Jacksonville, FL 32226
data.status: targeting an early to mid-August opening
data.short_description: Southern Smokehouse is the first barbecue concept from South Atlantic Hospitality. The full-service restaurant with 120 seats and liquor bar will feature traditional barbecue with Southern spins, more salads, and weekly specials.

data.status: Targeting June 15 opening.
data.short_description: Blackberry Creamery & Cafe is an ice cream-focused concept in an outdoor food truck park with seating and multiple vendors.

data.status: Targeting October–November opening.
data.short_description: Supra Revolving Sushi Bar is a full-service restaurant with conveyor belt sushi, hibachi, ramen, and more.

data.location: 12553 Bartram Park Blvd., Suite 302, Jacksonville, FL 32258
data.status: Targeting June 18 opening.
data.short_description: Lucky Goat Coffee is a fast-casual coffee shop with indoor seating and small patio offering espresso drinks, cold brew, and pastries.

data.status: targeting a June 6 opening
data.short_description: Big Bone BBQ is a self-serve Texas-style barbecue concept in a historic 1918 home. It will focus on dino beef ribs, brisket, beef cheeks, and housemade sides and sauces.

data.status: targeting an opening around August 1st
data.short_description: Donatos Pizza is opening a location with thin crust, party-cut pizza, subs, salads, and wings in a fast-casual setup with limited seating and pickup/delivery focus.

data.location: 2401 N. Ponce de Leon Blvd., Unit B, St. Augustine, FL 32084
data.status: now in a soft-opening phase... targeting a full opening within about two weeks
data.short_description: Maison Louis Cafe is in soft opening with counter-service French bistro style offerings including Lavazza coffee, viennoiserie, house-made sandwiches, quiches, and salads. It operates 7 a.m.–4 p.m. daily while awaiting final approvals.
